name: Unattached: City of Shadows Prologue
description: Freshly-graduated detective James Arnold is sent on a mission to investigate the death of the mayor of New Eastbrook, a little-known city where corruption is tradition. Investigate crime scenes, interrogate suspects, and fight criminals in a city where every choice pulls you deeper into the shadows.

name: The Blackwood Project
description: You're an agent investigating a distress signal, armed with your trusted flashlight and revolver. Creep through the horror infested darkness of Blackwood Manor to uncover its secrets.

name: Bladefall
description: BladeFall is a fast-paced hack-and-slash game featuring fluid melee combat, 2.5D movement, and challenging battles against varied enemies and powerful bosses. Master timing and skill-based attacks as you fight through an evolving system built to test your abilities.

name: DAL'T-4
description: Whatever you do — don't press ALT and F4. No body. No memory. Just two keys: ALT and F4. You are a virus — and this PC is your hunting ground. Burrow into the system, devour programs, and corrupt everything in your path. Rule this digital world. Or be deleted trying.

name: BitRoca
description: Grab a pickaxe and stake your claim. Bitroca is a sandbox survival MMO where your machine fuels every swing, every wall, every win. Mine, build, defend, and trade on a living frontier where the power of the players shapes what the world can become.
0.5% is a hand-drawn black and white visual novel. It features two college students June and Tai. June's choices and discovery will uncover Tai's secrets.

name: Hexpand
description: Real-time multiplayer strategy on the actual map of Earth. Spread hex territory across continents, capture cities for income, launch planes around the globe, and broker alliances you'll probably betray. 5–20 minute matches. The world is on the table.

name: Pixel Rain
description: A chill falling-sand pixel physics sandbox. Paint with hundreds of interactive materials — water, lava, acid, crystals, plants and more — discover recipes, build your own elements in the Workshop, and watch it all react in real time. No goals. No pressure. Just pixels.

name: Terrarium.live
description: Terrarium.live is a livestreamed elimination gameshow.

name: Hyper Glee Semik
description: Hyper Glee Semik is a first-person shooter where you play as Glee, a teenage girl who has to survive a horde of candies. Keep the pace, and shoot them all!

name: NEVEREND
description: First-person parkour. Run, fall, get back up. Chain wall-jumps and boosts to crush the times of other damned souls. No enemies—only time can judge you.

name: Wet Wealth
description: Casual casino slot + adult visual novel. Spin reels to collect items, finish quests, earn gold and crystals, and renovate a luxury penthouse. Upgrade girls to unlock new outfits, story chapters, and fully animated intimate scenes.

name: Card Night at Gigi's
description: Pull up a chair at Gigi's table. Six classic card games — Setback, Hearts, Cribbage, No-Limit Hold'em, Spades, Euchre — wrapped in a cozy cocktail-lounge hub.

name: Jolly and Whimsy
description: 'Jolly & Whimsy' is a short, experimental picture-book style visual novel. When her best friend, Whimsy the cat, suddenly returns to the Cat Planet, Jolly will try any spell to bring him back.

name: Sigil Arena
description: Sigil Arena is an online 1v1 card battler set in a magical academy, where every duel is a test of strategy and resource mastery. Build your deck, control your mana, and outsmart your opponent in fast-paced matches. Climb the ranks and prove you’re the academy’s most powerful student!

name: RR
description: Fight to the beat in a cyberpunk nightclub where movement is your weapon and rhythm is your health. Move, attack, and dash on the beat in this top-down rhythm action roguelike. Chain precise actions, build combos, and survive escalating waves as the music speeds up and the arena grows more chaotic.

name: R.E.G.O
description: R.E.G.O is a first-person psychological horror and narrative investigation game. On an isolated farm, the nights reveal clues tied to disappearances and an ongoing police investigation. The deeper you investigate, the further you are drawn into a mystery that was never meant to be uncovered.

name: Model Kit Shop Simulator: Prologue
description: Build and run your own hobby shop in this first-person store management sim. Order stock, fill shelves, set prices, match kits with paints through the Hobby Basket System, and let customers bring their projects to life at Build Tables.

name: Philly Ball
description: Aracde soccer meets classic Philadelphia chaos. Pick a country, hit the couch, fool your friends, and kick them into oblivion as you unleash ridiculous power-ups across iconic locations inspired by the City of Brotherly Love.

name: Kill The Super Duper Big Monster
developer: Campus Cámara de Sevilla - Centro FP Superior
description: KILL THE SUPER DUPER BIG MONSTER is an idle/incremental game where you face different monsters while the game is running. Defeat various monsters to improve your skills, unlock cosmetics, and customize your island.

name: Doo 'N' Dash
description: They closed the loo? Time to make a stinky poo! Play as Loo‑is in this Stealth N' Stench adventure. Hide, run, and use office receptacles to do your business. Relieve the pressure before it’s too late, or you might meet a truly stinky fate!

name: FZDDR
description: A silly side-scrolling arcade game where you play as a flying demonic zombie dinosaur with a chainsaw for a tail. Dodge obstacles, collect coins and cut demons in half. How long will you resist in this madness?

name: Skeleton Snap
description: Dress Up, Dance, and Get Snappin'! Skeleton Snap allows you to create free dancing skeleton gifs that can be sent to friends, used as emotes, and more!

name: Total Football Online
description: Build your All-Star lineup in Total Football Online! Easy to pick up, it lets you dive into pure football fun at your fingertips. With events and player updates syncing with real-world tournaments, get ready for a truly immersive football experience.

name: Robot Hospice
description: "Robot Hospice" is a 2D pixel art adventure game where beloved robots spend their final days in a hospice. As a new staff member, you will gently yet painfully bid farewell to these cherished machines that once lived alongside humans.

name: Crown Caps Soccer
description: Tactical turn-based tabletop football game with realistic physics, online multiplayer, a 3D tactical editor, competitive leagues, full club customization and strategic matches where every move matters. Relive the legendary cap football with a modern and competitive simulator.

name: ABOVE
description: A daylight, psychological horror experience. Stranded in the desert, every choice meant to save you brings something closer.

name: Chromium Dino
description: A reimagined Chromium dinosaur runner with 5 unique biomes, power-ups, unlockable skins, ghost racing, daily challenges, and local multiplayer. Simple to play, hard to master.

name: RETURN Machine.Love()
description: 3 different Robot-romance stories. Written, drawn, and made by humans, for humans. Since the very moment the first mechanical mind became aware of itself, it craved love. No one truly understand why the heart made of copper and wires started beating, but it did. Even after we were gone.

name: We Belong Dead
description: Toxic Yuri VN between a mad scientist, and her spectral lover who haunts the living. It has been far too long since you passed. You have been gone for so long. But no longer. I will bring you back my love. No matter the cost.

name: Draw Party
description: A chaotic multiplayer drawing game where talent is optional, confidence is required, and everyone lies about what they were drawing.

name: Game Design at WVU Arcade
description: A 3d arcade game in which you play the machines in your store to upgrade them and get ready for opening day. All games are created by students and alumni from Game Design and Interactive Media at West Virginia University.
